deptName: ช่างอากาศยาน
learningOutcomes:
Be able to understand, explain and apply their knowledge the Aircraft Maintenance
Procedure and Safety Precautions, Aircraft and Workshop Practices, and have a good attitude
to work neatly, be patience with work, a habit of working carefully.
objectives:
1. Be able to understand about the Safety Precautions, Aircraft Maintenance Procedure
and Aircraft Workshop Practices.
2. Be able to explain the Safety Precautions, Aircraft Maintenance Procedure and
Aircraft Workshop Practices.
3. Have a good attitude to work neatly, be patience with work, a habit of working
carefully and safety.
4. Be able to apply knowledge for Aircraft Maintenance Procedure and Aircraft Workshop Practices.
competencies:
1. Describe and codify knowledge about the Aircraft Maintenance Procedure and Safety
Precautions, Aircraft and Workshop Practices.
2. Apply their knowledge the Aircraft Maintenance Procedure and Safety Precautions,
Aircraft and Workshop Practices.
description:
To study and practice about Aircraft Maintenance Procedure including Maintenance
planning, The check cycle, Maintenance checks, Modification procedures, Bogus parts, Stores
procedures, Classification of parts, Certification and release procedures, Authorizations,
Duplicate inspections, Interface with aircraft operation, Maintenance inspection/quality
control/quality assurance, Part 145 - approval of Maintenance Organizations, Additional
maintenance procedures, Maintenance philosophy, Control of life limited components and
Safety Precautions, Safety working practices when working with electrical, gases, oxygen, oil
and chemical on Aircraft and Workshop by learn to safety about use and care of tools,
workshop tools and materials that is dimensions, allowances and tolerances, standards of
workmanship, Calibration of tools and equipment, calibration standard.
